snippet.title: Perseverance Rover‚Äôs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: NASA‚ÄôS Perseverance Rover‚Äôs First 360 View of Mars (Official)
snippet.description:
This video shows the first 360-degree view of the landing site of NASA‚Äôs Perseverance rover on Mars, as captured by the rover‚Äôs color Navigation Cameras, or Navcams. The Navcams are on the remote sensing mast (or ‚Äúhead‚Äù) of the rover.  Perseverance possesses the most cameras of any Mars rover to date, with 19 on the rover. Perseverance landed on Mars‚Äô Jezero Crater on February 18, 2021. These images were obtained on February 20, 2021. 

A key objective for Perseverance‚Äôs mission on Mars is astrobiology, including the search for signs of ancient microbial life. The rover will characterize the planet‚Äôs geology and past climate, pave the way for human exploration of the Red Planet, and be the first mission to collect and cache Martian rock and regolith.


Please note: Not all browsers support viewing 360 videos. YouTube supports their playback on computers using Chrome, Firefox, Internet Explorer, and Opera browsers. For best experience on a mobile device, play this video in the YouTube app.

For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance


Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Panorama of Mars from Perseverance Rover
snippet.description:
This panorama, taken on Feb. 20, 2021, by the Navigation Cameras, or Navcams, aboard NASA‚Äôs Perseverance Mars rover, was stitched together from six individual images after they were sent back to Earth. 

A key objective for Perseverance‚Äôs mission on Mars is astrobiology, including the search for signs of ancient microbial life. The rover will characterize the planet‚Äôs geology and past climate, pave the way for human exploration of the Red Planet, and be the first mission to collect and cache Martian rock and regolith.

Subsequent missions, currently under consideration by NASA in cooperation with ESA (European Space Agency), would send spacecraft to Mars to collect these cached samples from the surface and return them to Earth for in-depth analysis.

The Mars 2020 Perseverance mission is part of NASA‚Äôs Moon to Mars exploration approach, which includes Artemis missions to the Moon that will help prepare for human exploration of the Red Planet.

NASA‚Äôs Jet Propulsion Laboratory in Southern California built and manages operations of the Mars 2020 Perseverance rover for NASA.

For more information about the mission, go to: https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020

Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

The rover will characterize the planet‚Äôs geology and past climate, pave the way for human exploration of the Red Planet, and be the first mission to collect and cache Martian rock and regolith.

Subsequent missions, currently under consideration by NASA in cooperation with ESA (European Space Agency), would send spacecraft to Mars to collect these cached samples from the surface and return them to Earth for in-depth analysis.

The Mars 2020 Perseverance mission is part of NASA‚Äôs Moon to Mars exploration approach, which includes Artemis missions to the Moon that will help prepare for human exploration of the Red Planet.

NASA‚Äôs Jet Propulsion Laboratory in Southern California built and manages operations of the Mars 2020 Perseverance rover for NASA.

For more information about the mission, go to: https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020

Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Watch NASA‚Äôs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover ‚Äì the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space ‚Äì search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA‚Äôs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: MORTAL KOMBAT - Oficjalny zwiastun #1 PL
snippet.description:
New Line Cinema przedstawia nowƒÖ wybuchowƒÖ przygodƒô filmowƒÖ pod tytu≈Çem Mortal Kombat. Produkcja jest zainspirowana bestsellerowƒÖ seriƒÖ gier wideo, kt√≥rej najnowsza ods≈Çona, Mortal Kombat 11, cieszy≈Ça siƒô niedawno najlepszym debiutem ze wszystkich czƒô≈õci. Re≈ºyserii podjƒÖ≈Ç siƒô nagradzany australijski tw√≥rca reklam Simon McQuoid. Obraz jest jego pierwszym filmem fabularnym. Producentami sƒÖ James Wan (filmy z uniwersum Obecno≈õƒá, Aquaman), Todd Garner (Epicentrum, Berek), sam McQuoid oraz E. Bennett Walsh (Men in Black: International, Niesamowity Spider-Man 2). 
Zawodnik mieszanych sztuk walki Cole Young przywyk≈Ç do tego, ≈ºe obrywa za pieniƒÖdze. Nie ma jednak pojƒôcia o swoim pochodzeniu i nie wie, dlaczego w≈Çadca Za≈õwiat√≥w Shang Tsung nas≈Ça≈Ç na niego swojego najlepszego wojownika, Sub-Zero, kriomancera z innego wymiaru. W obawie o bezpiecze≈Ñstwo rodziny Cole udaje siƒô na poszukiwanie Sonyi Blade, poleconƒÖ mu przez Jaxa. Ten major si≈Ç specjalnych ma takie samo dziwne znamiƒô w kszta≈Çcie smoka, z jakim urodzi≈Ç siƒô Cole. Wkr√≥tce Cole trafia do ≈õwiƒÖtyni Lorda Raidena, jednego ze Starszych B√≥stw i obro≈Ñcy Ziemi, zapewniajƒÖcego schronienie tym, kt√≥rzy majƒÖ smocze znamiƒô. W ≈õwiƒÖtyni Cole trenuje z do≈õwiadczonymi wojownikami Liu Kangiem i Kung Lao oraz zbuntowanym najemnikiem Kano.  Wsp√≥lnie stanƒÖ do walki najwiƒôkszych mistrz√≥w Ziemi z przeciwnikami z Za≈õwiat√≥w, w kt√≥rej stawkƒÖ jest wszech≈õwiat. Ale czy Cole zdo≈Ça uwolniƒá swoje arcana ‚Äì niezmierzonƒÖ moc we wnƒôtrzu duszy ‚Äì i zdƒÖ≈ºy nie tylko ocaliƒá bliskich, ale i powstrzymaƒá Za≈õwiaty raz na zawsze?
Plejada wykonawc√≥w z ca≈Çego ≈õwiata oddaje globalnƒÖ naturƒô marki. SƒÖ w≈õr√≥d nich aktorzy kinowi, telewizyjni oraz zawodnicy sztuk walki, tacy jak Lewis Tan (Deadpool 2, serial Netflixa Wu Assassins) w roli Cole‚Äôa Younga; Jessica McNamee (Meg) w roli Sonyi Blade; Josh Lawson (GorƒÖcy temat) w roli Kano; Tadanobu Asano (Midway) w roli Lorda Raidena; Mehcad Brooks (serial Supergirl) w roli Jacksona ‚ÄûJaxa‚Äù Bridgesa; Ludi Lin (Aquaman) w roli Liu Kanga; Chin Han (Drapacz chmur) w roli Shanga Tsunga; Joe Taslim (Star Trek: W nieznane) w podw√≥jnej roli Bi-Hana i Sub-Zero oraz Hiroyuki Sanada (Drapacz chmur) w rolach Hanzo Hasashiego i Skorpiona. Poza tym w filmie wystƒôpujƒÖ Max Huang jako Kung Lao; Sisi Stringer jako Mileena; Matilda Kimber jako Emily Young i Laura Brent jako Allison Young.

snippet.title: 17. PotrƒÖcenie w parku
snippet.description:
Klient w krawacie mia≈Ç byƒá mniej awanturujƒÖcy.


‚ñ∫Fanpage: https://www.facebook.com/StopChamWarszawa
‚ñ∫Twitter: https://twitter.com/Stop_Cham_W_wa
‚ñ∫Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/stopchamwarszawa
‚ñ∫Patronite: https://patronite.pl/StopChamWarszawa


P R Z E C Z Y T A J    Z A N I M    S K O M E N T U J E S Z 

Drodzy Widzowie, ci, kt√≥rzy nas popierajƒÖ oraz ci, kt√≥rzy nienawidzƒÖ...
 
Kilka s≈Ç√≥w wyja≈õnienia.

* Autor nagrania nie musia≈Ç wzywaƒá Policji od razu i spƒôdziƒá w tym miejscu dodatkowych dw√≥ch godzin. MajƒÖc mocny dow√≥d w postaci filmu mo≈ºemy zg≈Çosiƒá kierowcƒô w terminie p√≥≈∫niejszym. Natomiast dzie≈Ñ po publikacji Policja sama zainteresowa≈Ça siƒô sprawƒÖ i zajmuje siƒô niƒÖ Wydzia≈Ç Ruchu Drogowego Komendy Sto≈Çecznej Policji.

* W Parku Br√≥dnowskim prowadzone sƒÖ prace modernizacyjne zbiornik√≥w wodnych. O ile plac budowy jest ogrodzony, to droga dojazdowa na budowƒô nie jest zabezpieczona w og√≥le. ZarzƒÖdca parku wyrazi≈Ç zgodƒô na dojazd wykonawcy samochodami dostawczymi i ciƒô≈ºarowymi. Ka≈ºdy pojazd powinien mieƒá umieszczony w widocznym miejscu identyfikator, a tak≈ºe mieƒá przy sobie zezwolenie z Urzƒôdu Dzielnicy.

* Wykonawca by≈Ç zobowiƒÖzany zabezpieczyƒá doj≈õcia do alej stosownymi barierkami ‚Äì nie zrobi≈Ç tego.

* Wedle naszej wiedzy, osoba uwieczniona na filmie nie jest pracownikiem Wykonawcy. 

* Wzd≈Çu≈º 350 metrowej alejki je≈ºd≈ºƒÖ samochody dostawcze, ciƒô≈ºarowe, a tak≈ºe samochody osobowe (bez widocznego zezwolenia). Po zachodniej stronie budowy sƒÖ dwa wjazdy, miƒôdzy kt√≥rymi kursujƒÖ samochody ciƒô≈ºarowe, zawracajƒÖ na kilka razy (co chwila cofajƒÖc). Je≈õli w pobli≈ºu znajdzie siƒô osoba starsza, osoba o kulach, na w√≥zku bƒÖd≈∫ niewidoma - dojdzie do tragedii. Podczas manewr√≥w wzd≈Çu≈º po chodniku ginie od kilku do kilkunastu os√≥b rocznie. 

*  Nagrywanie takich film√≥w, nawet je≈õli nie zako≈Ñczy≈Ço siƒô przyjazdem Policji a kierowca nie zosta≈Ç ukarany na miejscu ma sens. Oczywi≈õcie, ≈ºe zale≈ºy nam na wy≈õwietleniach, przez co mo≈ºemy nag≈Ço≈õniƒá patologiczne zachowania kierowc√≥w na chodnikach (sic!). Dziƒôki zasiƒôgowi tego filmu ju≈º dzie≈Ñ po publikacji:

- sprawƒÖ zainteresowa≈Ça siƒô Policja, 
- odezwa≈Ça siƒô do nas Sto≈Çeczna Gazeta Wyborcza, kt√≥ra  opisa≈Ça sytuacjƒô w artykule, 
- dostali≈õmy mail od redakcji TVN 24 i Fakty TVN, kt√≥re sƒÖ zainteresowane, aby nag≈Ço≈õniƒá ca≈Çe wydarzenia.


artyku≈Ç Gazety Wyborczej:

https://warszawa.wyborcza.pl/warszawa/7,54420,26811050,nagral-samochod-jadacy-alejkami-w-parku-kierowca-go-zwyzywal.html


przyk≈Çadowe artyku≈Çy na temat ≈õmiertelnych potrƒÖce≈Ñ pieszych przez kierowc√≥w je≈ºd≈ºƒÖcych pojazdami silnikowymi wzd≈Çu≈º po chodniku:

https://www.transport-publiczny.pl/mobile/w-polsce-piesi-gina-nawet-na-chodnikach-59769.html

P R Z E C Z Y T A J    Z A N I M    S K O M E N T U J E S Z 

Drodzy Widzowie, ci, kt√≥rzy nas popierajƒÖ oraz ci, kt√≥rzy nienawidzƒÖ...
 
Kilka s≈Ç√≥w wyja≈õnienia.

* Autor nagrania nie musia≈Ç wzywaƒá Policji od razu i spƒôdziƒá w tym miejscu dodatkowych dw√≥ch godzin. MajƒÖc mocny dow√≥d w postaci filmu mo≈ºemy zg≈Çosiƒá kierowcƒô w terminie p√≥≈∫niejszym. Natomiast dzie≈Ñ po publikacji Policja sama zainteresowa≈Ça siƒô sprawƒÖ i zajmuje siƒô niƒÖ Wydzia≈Ç Ruchu Drogowego Komendy Sto≈Çecznej Policji.

* W Parku Br√≥dnowskim prowadzone sƒÖ prace modernizacyjne zbiornik√≥w wodnych. O ile plac budowy jest ogrodzony, to droga dojazdowa na budowƒô nie jest zabezpieczona w og√≥le. ZarzƒÖdca parku wyrazi≈Ç zgodƒô na dojazd wykonawcy samochodami dostawczymi i ciƒô≈ºarowymi. Ka≈ºdy pojazd powinien mieƒá umieszczony w widocznym miejscu identyfikator, a tak≈ºe mieƒá przy sobie zezwolenie z Urzƒôdu Dzielnicy.

* Wykonawca by≈Ç zobowiƒÖzany zabezpieczyƒá doj≈õcia do alej stosownymi barierkami ‚Äì nie zrobi≈Ç tego.

* Wedle naszej wiedzy, osoba uwieczniona na filmie nie jest pracownikiem Wykonawcy. 

* Wzd≈Çu≈º 350 metrowej alejki je≈ºd≈ºƒÖ samochody dostawcze, ciƒô≈ºarowe, a tak≈ºe samochody osobowe (bez widocznego zezwolenia). Po zachodniej stronie budowy sƒÖ dwa wjazdy, miƒôdzy kt√≥rymi kursujƒÖ samochody ciƒô≈ºarowe, zawracajƒÖ na kilka razy (co chwila cofajƒÖc). Je≈õli w pobli≈ºu znajdzie siƒô osoba starsza, osoba o kulach, na w√≥zku bƒÖd≈∫ niewidoma - dojdzie do tragedii. Podczas manewr√≥w wzd≈Çu≈º po chodniku ginie od kilku do kilkunastu os√≥b rocznie. 

*  Nagrywanie takich film√≥w, nawet je≈õli nie zako≈Ñczy≈Ço siƒô przyjazdem Policji a kierowca nie zosta≈Ç ukarany na miejscu ma sens. - sprawƒÖ zainteresowa≈Ça siƒô Policja,

snippet.title: Camogli, crolla una parte del cimitero e le bare finiscono in mare
snippet.description:
La frana nel comune del genovese. Sul posto i vigili del fuoco di Rapallo

 Una frana ha provocato oggi pomeriggio il crollo di una grossa porzione del cimitero di Camogli, borgo marinaro e turistico in provincia di Genova. Una porzione del costone roccioso in cima al quale si trova il camposanto e√® precipitato in mare trascinando via loculi e tombe. Almeno 200 bare sono finite in acqua. Sul posto sono arrivate le squadre dei vigili del fuoco di Rapallo e una squadra di sommozzatori. Non sono ancora chiare le cause del crollo del terreno che ospita il cimitero ma da alcuni giorni erano in corso lavori proprio sulla falesia franata in mare perch√© erano stati registrati movimenti di terreno. Nei giorni scorsi la parete era stata investita da una forte mareggiata che ha ulteriormente eroso il terreno. Il crollo ha trascinato con s√® un'ala del cimitero occupata da alcune centinaia di loculi. Pompieri e personale della Protezione Civile ha tentato da subito il recupero dei feretri finiti in acqua ma solo una decina a sera erano stati riportati a terra.  ¬´Vicino all'area del crollo - ha spiegato il sindaco di Camogli Francesco Olivari - sono in corso lavoro di consolidamento della falesia. Da una prima analisi, ma solo domani potremo fare esami pi√π accurati, emerge che √® stato un crollo difficilmente prevedibile e contenibile¬ª.  La Guardia costiera ha sistemato delle barriere in mare per contenere i materiali finiti in acqua e non ancora recuperati. ( Corriere Tv ). Guarda il video su Corriere: https://video.corriere.it/cronaca/camogli-crolla-parte-cimitero-bare-finiscono-mare/20a3ce20-7531-11eb-b048-5f97627f6464

snippet.title: Army of the Dead | Official Teaser | Netflix
snippet.description:
A Zack Snyder film. On Netflix May 21. 

Following a zombie outbreak in Las Vegas, a group of mercenaries take the ultimate gamble, venturing into the quarantine zone to pull off the greatest heist ever attempted.

Starring Dave Bautista, Ella Purnell, Ana de la Reguera, Matthias Schweigh√∂fer, Nora Arnezeder, Hiroyuki Sanada, Ra√∫l Castillo, Michael Cassidy, and Garret Dillahunt.

Story by Zack Snyder  
Screenplay by Zack Snyder & Shay Hatten and Joby Harold  
Directed by Zack Snyder

SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/29qBUt7

About Netflix:
Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service with 204 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can watch as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, on any internet-connected screen. Members can play, pause and resume watching, all without commercials or commitments.

Army of the Dead | Official Teaser | Netflix
https://youtube.com/Netflix

snippet.title: Perseverance spots sky crane's Mars impact plume after touchdown
snippet.description:
Shortly after touchdown on Mars, Perseverance's right rear hazcam captured 2 images of the sky crane impact site prior to the camera's dust covers being removed. Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter imagery of impact site is show here as well. -- Wow! See the Perseverance rover dangling above Mars in this amazing landing photo: https://www.space.com/perseverance-rover-over-mars-skycrane-landing-photos

Credit: Space.com | footage courtesy: NASA/JPL-Caltech/Jason Major | produced & edited by Steve Spaleta (http://www.twitter.com/stevespaleta)

snippet.title: 6 MIN EVERYDAY STRETCH - for stiff muscles, flexibility & after your workout I Pamela Reif
snippet.description:
a quick routine for every day ‚ô•Ô∏é it works perfectly as a cool down after ANY kind of workout! But of course, you can also do this in an office break, simply to relax, before bed or in the morning / Werbung 

We stretch our entire body! 6min = 12 exercises. Short but beneficial :)
- legs, hips & butt
- tummy 
- back & chest 
- spine 

I learned to love stretching sooooo much! I remember, about 6 months ago I definitely didn't stretch enough. This also impacted by training, since my muscles were feeling stiff and sore for longer, I started getting pain in my knees, etc. 
Now, I really look forward to a short stretch after a session. It's so relaxing, the music calms me down and you will quickly see improvements :)

Let's calm down & give our bodies some love in a different kind of way. 

__

‚ñ∏ you can find FREE WORKOUT PLANS on my Instagram Channel. 30min, 45min, Beginner Friendly combinations & a DANCE plan. Check out the Highlight Bubble "Workout Plans" for that.  

‚ûû Instagram http://www.instagram.com/pamela_rf/
use #PamelaReif if you want me to see your workout pics and videos! 

‚ñ∏ my Pam App ‚ô•Ô∏é Free workout plans, recipes & tips: 
https://appurl.io/5Exh2D1Uo 

__

‚ñ∏ You can always find ALL SONGS in my workout playlist. I update it weekly & it's available on Spotify, Apple Music, etc. ‚ô•Ô∏é
http://wmg.click/GetActive

1. Charlotte Cardin ‚Äì Daddy 0:00 - 2:46
2. Faouzia & John Legend - Minefields 2:47 - 5:43
3. Birdy - Loneliness 5:44 - 7:43

__ 

Business Contact:
pamela_reif@icloud.com

__
Disclaimer:
When joining me for this workout video, you need to take some precautions as your health and safety is the most important. To avoid any injury or harm, you need to check your health with your doctor before exercising. By performing any fitness exercises without supervision like with this video, you are performing them at your own risk. See a fitness professional to give you advice on your exercise form. Pamela Reif will not be responsible or liable for any injury or harm you sustain as a result of this video.

snippet.title: UFC 259 Free Fight: Israel Adesanya vs Paulo Costa
snippet.description:
A stacked UFC 259 featuring three title fights is right around the corner on Saturday, March 6. Middleweight champion Israel Adesanya will move up a weight class to take on light heavyweight champion Jan Blachowicz in the main event. Watch Adesanya's last title defense against Paulo Costa at UFC 253 last year on Fight Island to get ready for UFC 259.

localized.description:
A stacked UFC 259 featuring three title fights is right around the corner on Saturday, March 6. Middleweight champion Israel Adesanya will move up a weight class to take on light heavyweight champion Jan Blachowicz in the main event. Watch Adesanya's last title defense against Paulo Costa at UFC 253 last year on Fight Island to get ready for UFC 259.

snippet.title: Meatpacking: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver (HBO)
snippet.description:
The pandemic has thrown into high relief some of the longstanding issues surrounding working conditions in meatpacking facilities. John Oliver explains why greater oversight is needed, and how we can go about getting it.

snippet.title: Alan Walker x salem ilese - Fake A Smile (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
We've landed, Walkers. Welcome back to the World of Walker. I'm so excited to finally share my latest single with you all alongside the super talented @salem ilese . Our journey may have been paused at moments last year, but you've all shown that not even the worst can break this community. Thank you for being there for me and more importantly for each other. While we wait for the day to be together in person again, I hope this song resonates with you. You are not alone.

- Alan

en-GB.title: CLEO - KOCHAM / I love (Lyrics | Enable Subtitles)
en-GB.description:
‚≠êListen to CLEO - "KOCHAM" on digital services:
http://www.soundline.biz/CleoKocham/

Did you know that the state of falling in love is very similar to the feeling we experience after eating sweets? It's the happiness hormones! "KOCHAM" connects these two worlds, we shot the video in February 2020, meeting in this noble group in Zakopane.

sw.title: CLEO - Kocham / Nampenda (Lyrics | Wezesha Manukuu)
sw.description:
Sikiliza kipande CLEO - "KOCHAM" kwenye huduma za dijiti:
http://www.soundline.biz/CleoKocham/

Je! Unajua kuwa hali ya kupenda ni sawa na hisia tunazopata baada ya kula pipi? Ni homoni za furaha! "KOCHAM" inaunganisha walimwengu hawa wawili, tulipiga video mnamo Februari 2020, tukikutana katika kundi hili zuri huko Zakopane.

Kwenye video ya Cleo kulikuwa na wageni wengi mashuhuri kutoka ulimwengu wa YouTube, Instagram, TikTok: Roksana Wƒôgiel, Weronika Sowa, Marcysia Ryskala, Mateusz TrƒÖbka, Mateusz Krzy≈ºanowski, Damian Kordas, Magda Bereda, Adrianna Skon, Nadia D≈Çugosz, Pawe≈Ç Svinarski , Natalia Sisik, Martyna Zbira≈Ñska, Micha≈Ç Ga≈Ça, Mkurugenzi wa Maisha wa Daniel Rusin, Ola Szko≈Çka, Nicol Pniewska, Xavier Pniewski, Bart HighBart, HighMama

en-IE.title: CLEO - KOCHAM / I love (Lyrics | Enable Subtitles)
en-IE.description:
‚≠êListen to CLEO - "KOCHAM" on digital services:
http://www.soundline.biz/CleoKocham/

Did you know that the state of falling in love is very similar to the feeling we experience after eating sweets? It's the happiness hormones! "KOCHAM" connects these two worlds, we shot the video in February 2020, meeting in this noble group in Zakopane.

In Cleo's video there were many distinguished guests from the world of YouTube, Instagram, TikTok: Roksana Wƒôgiel, Weronika Sowa, Marcysia Ryskala, Mateusz TrƒÖbka, Mateusz Krzy≈ºanowski, Damian Kordas, Magda Bereda, Adrianna Skon, Nadia D≈Çugosz, Pawe≈Ç Svinarski, Ula Groty≈Ñska, Natalia Sisik, Martyna Zbira≈Ñska, Micha≈Ç Ga≈Ça, Daniel Rusin Director of Life, Ola Szko≈Çka, Nicol Pniewska, Xavier Pniewski, Bart HighBart, HighMama

Will this music video beat "Za Krokiem Krok" and become Cleo's most colorful music video?
